allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); req=d.get\('require',{}\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in req.items\(\) if k not in \('php',\) and 'symfony' not in k and 'doctrine' not in k and 'ext-' not in k]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); req=d.get\('require-dev',{}\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in req.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); req=d.get\('require',{}\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in req.items\(\) if 'tailwind' in k]")
